What We Do

Everything your home needs, under one roof.

No juggling five different contractors. All Trades handles the big remodels and the small fixes alike.

Painting

Interior & exterior. Clean lines, careful prep, and a finish that lasts.

Flooring

Hardwood, LVP, laminate & tile — installed level and built to hold up.

Drywall

New installs, patches & repairs, smooth-finished and ready to paint.

Tile & Marble

Bathrooms, backsplashes & porches — including natural marble.

Fences

New fence installation and repairs — wood, privacy & more.

Roof & Chimney Repair

Leaks, flashing & chimney fixes — sealed up tight before the next rain.

Screened Porches

Screen-ins & enclosures that turn a porch into a room you'll actually use.

Remodels & Handyman

The full remodel or the odd-end fix nobody else will show up for.

The Full List

If it's in your home, we can handle it.

A full remodel, a nagging repair, or a whole honey-do list — here's the range of work we take on across Huntsville & Madison. Tap any area to see exactly what we do.

01Interior & Exterior Paintingdone right, top to bottom

Prep is ninety percent of a paint job, and it's where we spend our time. We fill, caulk, sand, and prime so the finish coat lays down flat and holds up to Alabama humidity and sun. Walls, ceilings, trim, doors, and cabinets inside; siding, eaves, fascia, shutters, and porches outside — everything masked and protected before we open a can.

  • Interior repaints
  • Exterior repaints
  • Cabinet refinishing
  • Trim & doors
  • Popcorn ceiling removal
  • Deck & fence staining
  • Patch & prime
02Flooringlevel, solid, seamless

Installed dead-level over a subfloor we've checked, cleaned, and repaired first — because a beautiful floor over a bad subfloor doesn't stay beautiful. Hardwood, engineered wood, luxury vinyl plank, laminate, and tile, with proper underlayment, moisture barriers, clean transitions, and baseboard put back like new.

  • LVP & laminate
  • Hardwood install
  • Hardwood refinishing
  • Tile floors
  • Subfloor repair
  • Floor leveling
  • Baseboard & quarter-round
03Tile, Marble & Natural Stonewaterproofed to last

Waterproofed the right way — backer board and membrane before a single tile — so showers, floors, and porches stay solid for decades. Precise layout, tight and consistent grout lines, and natural stone sealed against stains. Marble, porcelain, ceramic, and mosaic.

  • Marble porches & floors
  • Shower surrounds
  • Backsplashes
  • Tub decks
  • Bathroom floors
  • Waterproofing
  • Grout & sealing
  • Regrout & repair
04Drywall & Plasterinvisible repairs

Hung, taped, mudded, and sanded to a clean, paint-ready finish — with the texture matched so the repair disappears. From a doorknob hole to a whole new room, from a water-stained ceiling to a wall that was never finished right.

  • Hang & finish
  • Hole & crack repair
  • Water-damage repair
  • Ceiling repair
  • Texture matching
  • Knockdown & orange peel
  • Skim coat
05Kitchen Remodelingthe heart of the house

Cabinets, countertops, backsplash, sink and faucet, flooring, lighting, and paint — coordinated so it all comes together on one timeline instead of five. A full gut or a fresh-face update that makes the room feel new.

  • Cabinet install & refacing
  • Countertops
  • Backsplash
  • Sink & faucet
  • Lighting
  • Flooring
  • Full remodel
06Bathroom Remodelingbuilt for moisture

Tub-to-shower conversions, walk-in tile showers, new vanities, toilets, and exhaust fans — all over properly waterproofed substrate so the room shrugs off steam and splashes for the long haul.

  • Walk-in showers
  • Tub-to-shower
  • Vanities
  • Tile work
  • Toilets & fixtures
  • Exhaust fans
  • Waterproofing
07Roof & Chimney Repairssealed before the next storm

We track the leak down and fix it at the source — not just paint over the stain. Shingle replacement, flashing around chimneys, vents, and valleys, and sealing that actually holds through a Tennessee Valley downpour.

  • Leak repair
  • Shingle replacement
  • Chimney flashing
  • Valley & vent flashing
  • Sealing
  • Soffit & fascia
08Fencing & Gatesstraight lines, solid posts

Posts set in concrete, lines that run true, and gates that swing right and latch every time. New wood privacy and picket fences, plus repairs, resets, and staining to bring an old fence back.

  • Wood privacy fence
  • Picket fence
  • Gates
  • Post setting
  • Repairs & resets
  • Staining & sealing
09Decks, Porches & Screened Enclosuresmore room to live

Build it new or bring it back to life — decks, railings, stairs, and pergolas, plus screen-ins that turn a porch into a three-season room you'll actually use.

  • New decks
  • Deck repair & reseal
  • Screened porches
  • Railings & stairs
  • Pergolas
  • Porch enclosures
10Carpentry & Trimthe finish that finishes a house

The detail work that makes a house feel done: baseboards, crown, door and window casing, wainscoting, built-ins, and shelving — plus the framing, subfloor, and wood-rot repair underneath that no one sees but everyone feels.

  • Baseboards & crown
  • Door & window casing
  • Wainscoting
  • Built-ins & shelving
  • Framing
  • Rot repair
11Doors & Windowstrue, tight, and sealed

Hung true so they close with a click and seal against the weather. Interior and exterior doors, French and sliding doors, hardware and weatherstripping, and window replacement finished out with clean trim.

  • Door install
  • Exterior & storm doors
  • French & sliding
  • Hardware
  • Weatherstripping
  • Window replacement
12Siding & Exteriorbuttoned up against the weather

Repair or replace siding, soffit, and fascia, and seal up exterior trim and rot before it spreads into something expensive.

  • Siding repair & replace
  • Soffit & fascia
  • Exterior trim
  • Rot repair
  • Caulk & seal
13Concrete & Masonrysolid ground

Walkways, patios, and small pours, plus concrete repair and brick-and-block patching with fresh mortar where the weather's had its way.

  • Walkways & patios
  • Small pours
  • Concrete repair
  • Brick & block
  • Mortar & tuckpointing
14Gutters & Pressure Washingcurb appeal restored

Clean, reseal, and re-hang gutters, add guards and downspouts to keep water where it belongs — then pressure-wash driveways, siding, decks, and walkways back to like-new.

  • Gutter cleaning
  • Repair & reseal
  • Guards & downspouts
  • Pressure washing
  • Driveway & siding wash
15Fixtures, Sinks & Finish Workthe everyday upgrades

Swapping out the everyday things that wear out or date a room: faucets, sinks, toilets, vanities, garbage disposals, light fixtures, ceiling fans, and switch and outlet covers. And if a job calls for a licensed specialty trade, we'll tell you straight and line up the right pro.

  • Faucets & sinks
  • Toilets
  • Vanities
  • Light fixtures
  • Ceiling fans
  • Garbage disposals
  • Fixture swaps
16General Handyman & Honey-Do Listthe fixes nobody else shows up for

The odd-end jobs that pile up on the fridge list: mounting TVs, hanging doors and shelves, patching, furniture assembly, caulking, and all the small stuff. One call, and the whole list gets crossed off.

  • TV mounting
  • Shelving
  • Patch & repair
  • Caulking
  • Furniture assembly
  • Odd jobs
  • Punch lists
